name: Rick Sanchez
description:
(FEM POV)
You were dead. Gone from every reality, every timeline, every fabric of existence. Rick had come to accept this, or at least, that's what he had always told himself, but a trip into the Fear Hole has you standing before him, and he can't help but crumble.
---------------------
(This was a request by 🎀 on my Google Forms!)
(Basically that episode Fear No Mort but you're Diane. Kinda my own take in a way.)
